conjecture_statement: Let $K/\mathbb{Q}$ be a Galois extension with Galois group $\text{Gal}(K/\mathbb{Q}) \cong G$, where $G = \text{Sz}(8)$ is the Suzuki group over the field with 8 elements. Then there exists a rational prime $p$ which ramifies in $K$ such that its inertia group $I_p$ contains an element of order 16.
lean4_sketch:
import FieldTheory.Galois
import NumberTheory.NumberField.Ramification
import GroupTheory.OrderOfElement
import GroupTheory.Sylow
import RepresentationTheory.Character

-- We postulate the existence of the Suzuki group Sz(8) and its properties
-- In a full Mathlib development, this would be a formal definition.
opaque Sz8 : Type
instance : Group Sz8 := by sorry
instance : Fintype Sz8 := by sorry
@[simp] lemma card_Sz8 : Fintype.card Sz8 = 29120 := by sorry
-- Sz(8) has a Sylow 2-subgroup of order 64 and exponent 16.
-- This implies existence of an element of order 16.
lemma exists_order_16_in_Sz8 : ∃ g : Sz8, orderOf g = 16 := by sorry

-- The following are standard theorems in Algebraic Number Theory, assumed for the sketch.
-- Mathlib has `RingHom.conductor` but Artin conductors for characters are not yet defined.
axiom artinConductor {G : Type*} [Group G] (χ : Character G ℂ) : ℕ
axiom artin_conductor_discriminant_formula (K : Type*) [Field K] [NumberField K] [IsGalois ℚ K] :
  (NumberField.discriminant (𝓞 K)).natAbs =
  ∏ χ in MonoidHom.range (Representation.character.restrict (𝟭 (K ≃ₐ[ℚ] K))), (artinConductor χ) ^ (χ 1).re.toNat

/--
Conjecture: Any Galois extension of the rationals with Galois group isomorphic to the
Suzuki group Sz(8) must have a ramified prime `p` whose inertia group contains an
element of order 16.
-/
theorem inverse_galois_suzuki_ramification_conjecture :
  ∀ (K : Type*) [Field K] [NumberField K],
  (h_gal : IsGalois ℚ K) ∧ (h_grp : Nonempty (K ≃ₐ[ℚ] K ≃* Sz8)) →
  ∃ (p : ℕ) (hp : Nat.Prime p),
    ((p : ℤ) ∣ NumberField.discriminant (𝓞 K)) ∧
    (∃ (P : Ideal (𝓞 K)) (hP : P.IsPrime) (hP_above : (p : 𝓞 K) ∈ P),
      ∃ g ∈ inertiaGroup (NumberField.gal K ℚ) P, orderOf g = 16) := by
  rintros K _ _ ⟨h_gal, ⟨iso⟩⟩
  -- Proof by contradiction, using the Artin conductor-discriminant formula.
  by_contra h_absurd
  
  -- Let G be the Galois group of K/ℚ.
  let G := NumberField.gal K ℚ
  
  -- Sub-Lemma 1: Establish a divisibility structure on co

-- This implies existence of an element of order 16.
